name: paywall
description: Section gate line. Everything below this block is rendered only to viewers at the declared tier or higher. Members see a labeled divider; non-members get the gate-CTA card in place of the line and everything past it is trimmed from the output.

tier.description: Required tier. Viewers at this tier or higher see the rest of the post; everyone else sees a CTA card and nothing past the line.

label.description: Plain text shown on the divider for members. Tier name auto-appended if absent.
